---
title: "VacancyRadar — Monthly Digest"
subtitle: "Рынок вакансий РФ"
author: "VacancyRadar"
date: today
date-format: "DD MMMM YYYY"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    fig-width: 9
    fig-height: 5
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
params:
  month: ""
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
month = ""  # quarto -P month=2026-04
```

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import date, datetime, timedelta
import duckdb
import polars as pl
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.io as pio

pio.templates.default = "plotly_white"

if month:
    target_month = datetime.strptime(month, "%Y-%m").date().replace(day=1)
else:
    today = date.today()
    target_month = (today.replace(day=1) - timedelta(days=1)).replace(day=1)

month_start = target_month
next_month = (month_start.replace(day=28) + timedelta(days=4)).replace(day=1)

PROJECT_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent.parent if "__file__" in globals() else Path.cwd()
# Quarto render запускает kernel из директории .qmd-файла → cwd = src/reports/.
# Нужен абсолютный путь к master/.
import os
if not (PROJECT_ROOT / "master").exists():
    PROJECT_ROOT = Path(os.environ.get("VRADAR_ROOT", "."))
EVENTS_DB = PROJECT_ROOT / "master" / "events.duckdb"
LAKE = PROJECT_ROOT / "master" / "vacancies_raw.parquet"
# VRADAR_SLIM_PATH overrides the live IT slim — set by `vradar report --scope full`
# so a full-market render does not poison the live dashboard artifact.
_slim_override = os.environ.get("VRADAR_SLIM_PATH")
SLIM = Path(_slim_override) if _slim_override else PROJECT_ROOT / "derived" / "slim_active.parquet"
REPORT_SCOPE = os.environ.get("VRADAR_SCOPE", "default")
```

## Период

**`{python} f"{month_start.strftime('%B %Y')}"`** (`{python} f"{month_start} → {next_month - timedelta(days=1)}"`)

```{python}
con = duckdb.connect(":memory:")
con.execute("INSTALL httpfs; LOAD httpfs;")

events_attached = EVENTS_DB.exists()
if events_attached:
    con.execute(f"ATTACH '{EVENTS_DB.as_posix()}' AS events_db (READ_ONLY)")

slim_loaded = SLIM.exists()
if slim_loaded:
    con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW slim AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{SLIM.as_posix()}')")
```

## Sanity check

```{python}
status = pl.DataFrame({
    "источник": ["events.duckdb", "slim_active.parquet"],
    "доступен": [events_attached, slim_loaded],
})
status
```

```{python}
month_events = con.execute("""
    SELECT type, count(*) AS n
    FROM events_db.main.events
    WHERE ts >= ? AND ts < ?
    GROUP BY type
    ORDER BY n DESC
""", [month_start, next_month]).fetchall()
events_summary = pl.DataFrame(month_events, schema={"type": pl.String, "n": pl.Int64}, orient="row")
events_summary
```

## Топ работодатели по новым вакансиям

```{python}
top_emp = con.execute("""
    WITH new_per_emp AS (
        SELECT employer_id AS bare_id, count(*) AS new_n
        FROM events_db.main.events
        WHERE type='appeared' AND ts >= ? AND ts < ?
            AND employer_id IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY bare_id
    ),
    named AS (
        SELECT 'hh:' || bare_id AS employer_id, new_n FROM new_per_emp
    )
    SELECT named.employer_id, slim.employer_name, named.new_n,
        coalesce(slim.disclosure_rate, 0) AS disclosure_rate
    FROM named
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT employer_id, any_value(employer_name) AS employer_name,
            avg(salary_disclosed::INT)::DOUBLE AS disclosure_rate
        FROM slim
        GROUP BY employer_id
    ) AS slim ON slim.employer_id = named.employer_id
    ORDER BY new_n DESC
    LIMIT 25
""", [month_start, next_month]).pl()
top_emp
```

```{python}
if not top_emp.is_empty():
    fig = px.bar(
        top_emp.head(15).to_pandas(),
        x="new_n", y="employer_name",
        orientation="h",
        labels={"new_n": "новых вакансий", "employer_name": ""},
        title="Топ-15 работодателей месяца",
    )
    fig.update_layout(yaxis={"categoryorder": "total ascending"}, height=420, margin={"l": 200})
    fig
```

## Динамика по дням

```{python}
daily = con.execute("""
    SELECT CAST(ts AS DATE) AS day,
        SUM(CASE WHEN type='appeared' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_n,
        SUM(CASE WHEN type='closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS closed_n
    FROM events_db.main.events
    WHERE ts >= ? AND ts < ?
    GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
""", [month_start, next_month]).pl()
daily
```

```{python}
if not daily.is_empty():
    fig = px.line(
        daily.to_pandas(), x="day", y=["new_n", "closed_n"],
        labels={"value": "events", "variable": "тип", "day": ""},
        title="Daily appeared vs closed",
    )
    fig.update_layout(height=320, legend_title_text="")
    fig
```

## Топ навыки в активных вакансиях

```{python}
top_skills = con.execute("""
    SELECT skill, count(*)::INT AS n
    FROM slim, unnest(skills) AS t(skill)
    WHERE skill IS NOT NULL AND skill <> ''
    GROUP BY skill
    ORDER BY n DESC
    LIMIT 20
""").pl()
top_skills
```

```{python}
if not top_skills.is_empty():
    fig = px.bar(
        top_skills.to_pandas(),
        x="n", y="skill",
        orientation="h",
        labels={"n": "упоминаний", "skill": ""},
        title="Топ-20 навыков",
    )
    fig.update_layout(yaxis={"categoryorder": "total ascending"}, height=520, margin={"l": 160})
    fig
```

## Зарплатные коридоры по seniority

```{python}
salary = con.execute("""
    SELECT seniority,
        count(*) FILTER (WHERE salary_rub_min IS NOT NULL) AS sample,
        quantile_cont(salary_rub_min, 0.25)::INT AS p25,
        quantile_cont(salary_rub_min, 0.5)::INT  AS median,
        quantile_cont(salary_rub_min, 0.75)::INT AS p75
    FROM slim
    WHERE salary_rub_min IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY seniority
    HAVING count(*) FILTER (WHERE salary_rub_min IS NOT NULL) >= 3
    ORDER BY median DESC NULLS LAST
""").pl()
salary
```

---

*Сгенерировано VacancyRadar / `{python} f"{datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}"`*
